name: Groribas
description: Groribas is an Alien, who works for Boros' team, the "Dark Matter Thieves". He is a Dragon-Level threat and has a large imposing body. Its head and hands consist of eyeless mouths with rows of long sharp teeth. His head has a spiky collar around his neck and is quite muscular. He can use acid and hand to hand combat to its fullest usage leading him to be called the best warrior by Geryuganshoop.
